ChangeRequest.name: Type of hedge domain
ChangeRequest.comment:
### Overview
The type of hedge domain does not contain the member "Economic hedge. Other", required in Finrep. Moreover the domain contain the member "Economic hedge. With use of fair value option", although sometime in Finrep the member required is only "Economic hedge". Including the member "Economic hedge. Other" we can consider "Economic hedge" = "Economic hedge. With use of fair value option" + "Economic hedge. Other"
### Contact person
@Arianna.Nuvoli
### Description of change request
Include in type of hedge domain:
- "Economic hedge. Other"
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
Type of hedge domain
### Before closing checklist
- [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
